'''Gar-Ul''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Weequay/Legends|Weequay]] criminal active on [[Qiilura/Legends|Qiilura]]. He and his brother [[Guta-Nay]] were [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]] employed by [[Ghez Hokan]]. It was said about Gar-Ul that he had more muscle than brains.

It was Gar-Ul who discovered [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Kast Fulier]] and his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Etain Tur-Mukan]] after a group of farmers tipped him. Kast Fulier was captured, but Etain escaped and Gar-Ul was unable to keep up with the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] Padawan. During the search for Etain he crossed paths with the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commando]] [[Darman Skirata|Darman]] in the forest, who killed Gar-Ul quickly and silently with his [[Vibroblade/Legends|vibroblade]].
